problem_title: Evidence becomes harder to preserve across providers
problem_description: Compliance teams face operational gaps when KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule checks remain isolated in separate tools. This fragmentation weakens audit readiness and makes it difficult to trace evidence through disconnected case and reporting workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and case management data into one unified workflow that preserves review history and supporting evidence for clearer audit readiness and operational traceability.
workflow_title: From disconnected checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates fragmented provider outputs into structured cases preserving detailed evidence for review, decision logging, and compliance audit readiness in one workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, preserving evidence and decisions for clearer audit trails and defensible compliance in complex digital asset operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected control layer connecting KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, cases and reporting into structured, auditable workflows for clearer compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle fragmented compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates dispersed provider outputs and user actions into one operational workflow, reducing manual handoffs and aligning fragmented checks with consistent decisions and rule-based case management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves comprehensive evidence including decision logs, case history, provider outputs and regulatory updates to support audit readiness and reviewability across compliance workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with your existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers without replacing them, orchestrating their outputs within controlled compliance workflows and governance structures.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but sits above them to connect, structure and preserve their outputs into workflows, cases, evidence and reports for better regulatory and operational control.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready evidence across compliance checks
final_description: Review how SFTY connects disconnected KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs into structured, evidence-grade case workflows.
